question_intent: Get the full name of the conference where the team that won the most games in the 1985 playoffs played

plan.question_intent: Get the full name of the conference where the team that won the most games in the 1985 playoffs played
plan.detail_query: SELECT m.fullname AS conference_fullname FROM seriespost s JOIN teams t ON s.tmidwinner = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year JOIN abbrev m ON t.confid = m.code WHERE s.year = 1985 AND s.round = 'F'

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
blocks.notes: get the conference ID and maximum wins for the team that won the most games in the 1985 playoffs

blocks.name: root
join_clauses: JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
JOIN abbrev a ON leaf_1.confid = a.code
blocks.notes: get the full name of the conference where the team that won the most games in the 1985 playoffs played

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams t
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year = 1985)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985) AND (s.round = 'F')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985) AND (s.round = 'F' OR s.round = 'DF')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985) AND (s.round = 'F' OR s.round = 'DF' OR s.round = 'FC')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985) AND (s.round = 'F' OR s.round = 'DF')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985) AND (s.round = 'F' OR s.round = 'DF' OR s.round = 'CQF')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985) AND (s.round IN ('F', 'DF', 'CQF'))
LIMIT 5

steps.reason: where predicate made the probe empty

steps.sql:
SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid

build_logs.notes: get the full name of the conference where the team that won the most games in the 1985 playoffs played

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid) AS leaf_1
JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year

JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid

steps.clause: s.round = 'F' OR s.round = 'DF' OR s.round = 'SCF' OR s.round = 'CF' OR s.round = 'SF' OR s.round = 'CQF' OR s.round = 'F'
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid) AS leaf_1
JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
JOIN abbrev a ON leaf_1.confid = a.code
WHERE (s.year = 1985 OR s.year = 1986) AND (s.round = 'F' OR s.round = 'DF' OR s.round = 'SCF' OR s.round = 'CF' OR s.round = 'SF' OR s.round = 'CQF' OR s.round = 'F')
LIMIT 5

steps.reason: where predicate made the probe empty

steps.sql:
SELECT a.fullname
FROM (SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid) AS leaf_1
JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
JOIN abbrev a ON leaf_1.confid = a.code
WHERE (s.year = 1985 OR s.year = 1986)

nearest.sql:
SELECT a.fullname
FROM teams AS t1 JOIN (SELECT t2.year, t2.tmid, MAX(t2.gf) AS max_gf
FROM teams AS t2
WHERE (t2.year = 2009)
GROUP BY t2.year) AS t3 ON t1.year = t3.year AND t1.tmid = t3.tmid AND t1.gf = t3.max_gf JOIN abbrev AS a ON t1.confid = a.code

question: Which conference's team has the full name of the team that won the most series in its conference, considering only series wins in 1985 and 1986?
